title: Connection-layer guard against integration tests writing to the live orchestration DB

steps.description: Add orch/db/live_db_guard.py chokepoint; wire safe_create_engine into orch/db/session.py and every create_engine call site across orch/ (safe_migrate.py, daemon/main.py create_session_factory, daemon/migration_pipeline.py, daemon/migration_rebase.py, daemon/worktree_compose.py, cli/merge_queue_commands.py); deprecate _assert_not_agent_context

Invert tests/conftest.py polarity (opt-out → opt-in); arm IW_CORE_DAEMON_CONTEXT in orch/daemon/__main__.py before Daemon construction; arm IW_CORE_OPERATOR_APPLY in iw migrations apply; add _agent_subprocess_env helper that strips allow-list flags at all 5 agent/gate launch sites in orch/daemon/
Review S03 conftest inversion + opt-in env var arming + executor-strip wiring

Reproduction tests (test-context subprocess + daemon-armed-agent subprocess); 13 unit tests for the guard; 10 unit tests for _agent_subprocess_env; cleanup hardcoded batch_id=42 in test_migration_pipeline.py; operator-only smoke test for live-DB write absence
Review S05 tests for semantic correctness and coverage of refused/allowed contexts
Global review across S01/S03/S05 — verify defense-in-depth chain holds end-to-end

Fix architectural issues where daemon functions created their own DB connections instead of accepting sessions from callers; update is_merge_queue_frozen, set_merge_queue_frozen, and _emit_daemon_event to accept optional db session parameter
QV: Integration tests (re-run after S13 fixes)
